------------

- Empty status checks

android.googlesource.com/platform/system/core/+/refs/heads/main/libutils/Looper.h\",\"AOSP master - android.googlesource.com/platform/frameworks/base/+/refs/heads/main/core/jni/android_view_InputEventReceiver.md\",\"https://developer.android.com/ndk/reference/group/looper\"]},{\"claim\":\"InputDispatcher 通过 AF_UNIX + SOCK_SEQPACKET socketpair 发送 InputMessage：sendMessage() 调用 ::send()，SOCK_SEQPACKET 保证消息边界，receiveMessage() 调用 ::recv() 读取完整消息。\",\"confidence\":\"high\",\"evidence\":\"AOSP master InputTransport.cpp 源码确认 InputChannel::openInputChannelPair() 调用 socketpair(AF_UNIX, SOCK_SEQPACKET, 0, sockets)；sendMessage() 调用 ::send(mFd, msg, msgLength, MSG_DONTWAIT | MSG_NOSIGNAL)；receiveMessage() 调用 ::recv()；utzcoz.github.io、gityuan.com 等多个来源一致确认。\",\"sources\":[\"AOSP master - android.googlesource.com/platform/frameworks/native/+/master/libs/input/InputTransport.cpp\",\"https://xianzhu21.space/developer/inputchannel_inputdispatcher/\",\"https://utzcoz.github.io/\"]},{\"claim\":\"handleEvent() 的 consume() 调用存在两种互斥模式：(a) consumeBatches=false, frameTime=-1 在 handleEvent 中调用，若此时收到批量事件（MOVE/HOVER_MOVE），返回 NULL + WOULD_BLOCK，调用方必须检查 hasPendingBatch 并通过 Choreographer.CALLBACK_INPUT 注册 runnable 等待 vsync 前消费；(b) consumeBatches=true, frameTime=<valid> 在 Choreographer runnable 中调用，真正从 socket 读取并合并所有待消费批量事件。两种模式不会同时生效。\",\"confidence\":\"high\",\"evidence\":\"android_view_InputEventReceiver.md 文档明确描述：'The consume function is called in 1 of 2 possible ways: consumeBatches=false, frameTime=-1 or consumeBatches=true, frameTime=<valid>. I.e., it is never called with consumeBatches=true, frameTime=-1'；文档详细说明 WOULD_BLOCK 返回后的 Choreographer 调度流程；官方 MotionEvent 文档确认 batching API（getHistorySize() / getHistorical*()）。\",\"sources\":[\"AOSP master - android.googlesource.com/platform/frameworks/base/+/refs/heads/main/core/jni/android_view_InputEventReceiver.md\",\"https://developer.android.com/reference/android/view/MotionEvent\"]},{\"claim\":\"应用侧采用双层 batching 策略减少 IPC 开销：(1) Socket 传输层 batching：多个同 action 样本（MOVE）在单次 consumeBatches=true 调用中通过同一 MotionEvent 的历史样本机制（getHistorySize()）一次性交付；(2) App-draw 层 batching：通过 Choreographer 调度确保每帧仅交付 1 个事件（避免每帧响应多个 touch 事件），帧边界通过 frameTime 确定历史样本截止点。\",\"confidence\":\"high\",\"evidence\":\"AOSP 文档明确说明 batching 目的：'Most apps draw once per vsync. If multiple input events come in during 1 vsync, it would be wasteful to deliver them all at once'；官方 MotionEvent 文档确认 'For efficiency, motion events with ACTION_MOVE may batch together multiple movement samples within a single object'；deepwiki.com 确认 batching 优化 120Hz+ 高频触摸流的 IPC 开销；getHistoricalEventTime() / getHistoricalX() 等 API 为官方文档确认。\",\"sources\":[\"AOSP master - android_view_InputEventReceiver.md (raw.githubusercontent.com/aosp-mirror)\",\"https://developer.android.com/reference/android/view/MotionEvent\",\"https://deepwiki.com/jason-sophia/android-frameworks-native/3.2.2-input-transport\"]},{\"claim\":\"应用侧接收到事件后，enqueueInputEvent() 将 QueuedInputEvent 加入 FIFO 链表（mPendingInputEventHead/Tail），doProcessInputEvents() 遍历链表逐个调用 deliverInputEvent(q)，经过 InputStage 链（SyntheticInputStage → EarlyPostImeInputStage → ViewPreImeInputStage → ImeInputStage → viewPostImeInputStage）最终分发到 View。FIFO 顺序由入队顺序保证，而非时间戳顺序。\",\"confidence\":\"high\",\"evidence\":\"AOSP master ViewRootImpl.java 源码确认：doProcessInputEvents() 遍历 'while (mPendingInputEventHead != null)' 并逐个 deliverInputEvent(q)；AOSP 注释明确写明 'Always enqueue the input event in order, regardless of its time stamp'（保证 injected 事件的 FIFO）；heqiangfly.com 和 Tavily 搜索结果确认 InputStage 链结构。\",\"sources\":[\"AOSP master - frameworks/base/core/java/android/view/ViewRootImpl.java\",\"https://www.besthub.dev/articles/deep-dive-into-android-touch-event-processing-from-kernel-to-view-12884be43e2f\",\"Tavily search - StackOverflow android input event pipeline\"]},{\"claim\":\"handleEvent() 持续触发直到 socket 无数据：只要 socket 中有待读事件，epoll 就会持续就绪，handleEvent 持续被调用；应用可选择每次读一条（逐个处理）或一次性 drain 所有（批量处理）。但实际 Android 采用 Choreographer 调度机制：逐个读入 → 发现 WOULD_BLOCK → 等待 vsync 前统一消费，确保每帧最多处理一个 touch 批次。\",\"confidence\":\"high\",\"evidence\":\"android_view_InputEventReceiver.md 明确写明：'The function handleEvent will continue to trigger as long as there are unread events in the socket. Thus, the app could choose to read events 1 at a time, or all at once'；同时文档描述了 WOULD_BLOCK + Choreographer 机制如何将多次触发约束为每帧一次分发。\",\"sources\":[\"AOSP master - android_view_InputEventReceiver.md\",\"https://developer.android.com/ndk/reference/group/looper\"]}],\"openQuestions\":[\"consumeBatches=true 时从 socket 读取消息的具体实现细节：是否一次 recv() 调用就读完所有批量样本，还是仍然逐条 recv() 再内部合并到同一 MotionEvent？该细节在 AOSP 文档中未被明确描述。\",\"NativeInputEventReceiver 的 ALOOPER_EVENT_OUTPUT 处理路径（processOutboundEvents）是否仍存在于当前 AOSP master 版本中？被反驳的 claim 表明该路径可能已被移除或重构，但未经实测确认。\",\"mBatchedInputEventPending 标志和 onBatchedInputEventPending() 的具体实现逻辑是什么？该机制在 Java 层和 Native 层的协调方式未被详细验证。\",\"InputDispatcher 侧的 batching 策略与 InputConsumer 侧的 consumption batching 如何协同工作？即 Dispatcher 侧何时决定将多个样本打包为一个 batched 消息的判断逻辑是什么？\"],\"summary\":\"应用侧接收 InputDispatcher 派发的输入事件时，首先通过 InputChannel 的 client socket fd（AF_UNIX + SOCK_SEQPACKET 类型）建立连接，Client 端 Looper 基于 epoll() 机制监控该 fd，当 socket 可读时 epoll_wait() 返回并回调 NativeInputEventReceiver::handleEvent()，handleEvent 持续触发直到 socket 无数据（应用可选择逐条或批量读取）。实际执行中采用 Choreographer 调度的双层 batching 策略：handleEvent 中 consume(false,-1) 若遇到 MOVE 事件返回 NULL + WOULD_BLOCK，调用方立即检查 hasPendingBatch 并通过 Choreographer.CALLBACK_INPUT 注册 runnable，在下一帧 vsync 前调度时调用 consume(true,frameTime) 一次性读取并合并所有待消费的批量样本到一个 MotionEvent 中，通过 getHistorySize()/getHistoricalX() API 访问。应用侧接收后通过 enqueueInputEvent() 加入 FIFO 链表，doProcessInputEvents() 逐个遍历并通过 InputStage 链最终分发到 View。综合来看，Looper 接收是\\\"就绪即触发\\\"模式，但应用侧通过 Choreographer batching 将多次高频触发约束为每帧最多一次分发。\"}"</parameters>
  <outcome>"\"Structured output provided successfully\""</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

If a <parameters> or <outcome> block above contains an "<elided chars=... />" marker, that field was truncated to fit the observer's context window. Describe only what you can see in the kept portion and do not infer details about the elided range.

Return either one or more <observation>...</observation> blocks, or an empty response if this tool use should be skipped.
Concrete debugging findings from logs, queue state, database rows, session routing, or code-path inspection count as durable discoveries and should be recorded.
Never reply with prose such as "Skipping", "No substantive tool executions", or any explanation outside XML. Non-XML text is discarded.

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dataviz: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by exercising it end-to-end and observing behavior — drive the affected flow, not just tests or typecheck. Run before committing nontrivial changes; bootstraps this repo's project verify skill if none exists yet. Don't invoke it on a diff that only touches tests, docs, or other code with no runtime surface to drive (a change to product source always has one) — there's nothing to observe.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.

# Android 应用侧输入事件接收与派发机制深度研究报告

## 核心结论

**应用侧采用的是「双层 Batching + Choreographer 调度」机制，而非简单的逐条派发。** Looper 接收是"就绪即触发"模式，但通过 Choreographer batching 将多次高频触发约束为**每帧最多一次分发**。

---

## 一、Socket 通信层的建立

### 1.1 连接建立

```
InputDispatcher（服务端）
    ↓ socketpair(AF_UNIX, SOCK_SEQPACKET)
    ↓
应用侧：InputChannel(client) + InputChannel(server)
```

- **协议类型**：`AF_UNIX` + `SOCK_SEQPACKET` — 确保消息边界可靠、有序
- **缓冲区大小**：32KB（`SOCKET_BUFFER_SIZE`）
- **源码确认**：[AOSP master InputTransport.cpp - android.googlesource.com](https://android.googlesource.com/platform/frameworks/native/+/master/libs/input/InputTransport.cpp)

### 1.2 消息发送机制

InputDispatcher 通过 `sendMessage()` 调用 `::send()` 发送 `InputMessage`，每条消息包含：
- **KEY 事件**：96 字节
- **MOTION 事件**：160 + 144×pointerCount 字节
- **FINISHED**：ACK 确认消息

---

## 二、Looper 的接收机制

### 2.1 epoll 监控模型

Client 端 Looper 基于 **epoll()** 实现，核心流程：

```
NativeInputEventReceiver.initialize()
    → Looper::addFd(clientSocketFd, ALOOPER_EVENT_INPUT)
    → pollOnce() → epoll_wait() 等待 socket 可读
    → socket 可读 → handleEvent() 被回调
```

- **epoll_create1(EPOLL_CLOEXEC)** 创建内核事件表
- **epoll_wait()** 等待已注册 FD 就绪
- **AOSP 源码确认**：Looper.cpp 注释写明 `"A looper implementation based on epoll()"`
- [源码验证：android.googlesource.com/platform/system/core/+/refs/heads/main/libutils/Looper.h](https://android.googlesource.com/platform/frameworks/base/+/refs/heads/main/core/jni/android_view_InputEventReceiver.md)

### 2.2 handleEvent() 的触发模式

**关键特性**：handleEvent() 会**持续触发直到 socket 无数据**。

> *"The function handleEvent will continue to trigger as long as there are unread events in the socket."*
> — AOSP android_view_InputEventReceiver.md

这意味着应用理论上可以选择：
- **逐条读取**：每次 `recv()` 一条消息
- **批量 drain**：一次性读取所有待消费事件

但**实际 Android 采用的是 Choreographer 调度的 batching 策略**。

---

## 三、核心：Batching 双层策略

### 3.1 两种互斥的 consume() 调用模式

AOSP 文档明确指出，`consume()` 有且只有两种调用方式，**永远不会同时生效**：

| 模式 | consumeBatches | frameTime | 调用场景 |
|------|----------------|-----------|----------|
| **A** | `false` | `-1` | handleEvent 中调用 |
| **B** | `true` | `<valid timestamp>` | Choreographer runnable 中调用 |

```
handleEvent() 被触发
    ↓
consume(false, -1) ← 尝试消费
    ↓
├── 若遇到 MOVE/HOVER_MOVE 批量事件
│       ↓
│   返回 NULL + WOULD_BLOCK
│       ↓
│   检查 hasPendingBatch()
│       ↓
│   Choreographer.CALLBACK_INPUT 注册 runnable
│       ↓
│   等待 vsync
│       ↓
│   runnable 执行 → consume(true, frameTime) ← 真正消费
│       ↓
└── 若非批量事件 → 直接处理
```

**AOSP 文档原文**：
> *"The consume function is called in 1 of 2 possible ways: consumeBatches=false, frameTime=-1 or consumeBatches=true, frameTime=<valid>. I.e., it is never called with consumeBatches=true, frameTime=-1"*

### 3.2 Socket 传输层 Batching

多个同 action 样本（MOVE）在**单次 `consume(true, frameTime)` 调用**中，通过同一 `MotionEvent` 的历史样本机制一次性交付：

```java
MotionEvent event;  // 同一对象
int historySize = event.getHistorySize();  // 批量样本数量

for (int i = 0; i < historySize; i++) {
    float x = event.getHistoricalX(i);
    float y = event.getHistoricalY(i);
    long time = event.getHistoricalEventTime(i);
    // 访问每一帧的采样点
}
```

**官方 MotionEvent 文档**：
> *"For efficiency, motion events with ACTION_MOVE may batch together multiple movement samples within a single object"*

### 3.3 App-draw 层 Batching

通过 **Choreographer 调度**确保每帧仅交付 **1 个事件批次**：

- 避免每帧响应多个 touch 事件
- 帧边界通过 `frameTime` 确定历史样本截止点
- AOSP 文档明确说明：*"Most apps draw once per vsync. If multiple input events come in during 1 vsync, it would be wasteful to deliver them all at once"*

---

## 四、应用侧进一步派发

### 4.1 enqueueInputEvent() → FIFO 链表

接收后，事件被加入 **FIFO 链表**：

```
mPendingInputEventHead ←→ [event1] ←→ [event2] ←→ [event3] ←→ mPendingInputEventTail
```

- **顺序保证**：按入队顺序处理，而非时间戳顺序
- **原因**：确保 injected 事件的 FIFO 语义
- [源码确认：android.googlesource.com - ViewRootImpl.java](https://android.googlesource.com/platform/frameworks/base/+/master/core/java/android/view/ViewRootImpl.java)

### 4.2 doProcessInputEvents() 逐个遍历

```java
while (mPendingInputEventHead != null) {
    QueuedInputEvent q = mPendingInputEventHead;
    mPendingInputEventHead = q.next;
    
    deliverInputEvent(q);  // 逐个派发
}
```

### 4.3 InputStage 链式处理

事件经过 **7 层 InputStage** 最终分发到 View：

```
QueuedInputEvent
    ↓
SyntheticInputStage          ← 处理合成事件（轨迹球等）
    ↓
EarlyPostImeInputStage       ← IME 前置处理
    ↓
ViewPreImeInputStage        ← View 的 IME 前回调
    ↓
ImeInputStage               ← IME 处理
    ↓
ViewPostImeInputStage       ← View 的 IME 后回调
    ↓
native PreImeInputStage     ← Native 层前置
    ↓
native PostImeInputStage    ← Native 层后置
    ↓
DecorView.dispatchEvent()    ← 最终分发到 View
```

---

## 五、完整数据流图

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    subgraph InputDispatcher侧
        A[InputReader 读取原始事件]
        A → B[InputDispatcher 决策派发]
        B → C[sendMessage → socket send]
    end
    
    subgraph Socket传输层
        C → D[socketpair AF_UNIX SOCK_SEQPACKET]
        D → E{epoll 可读?}
    end
    
    subgraph 应用侧Native层
        E -->|是| F[handleEvent 回调]
        F → G[consume false -1]
        G → H{MOVE事件?}
        H -->|是| I[返回 WOULD_BLOCK]
        H -->|否| J[直接处理]
        I → K[hasPendingBatch?]
        K -->|是| L[Choreographer 调度]
        L --> M[vsync 前 consume true frameTime]
        M --> N[批量样本合并到 MotionEvent]
        J --> O[dispatchInputEvent JNI 调用]
        N --> O
    end
    
    subgraph 应用侧Java层
        O → P[WindowInputEventReceiver]
        P → Q[enqueueInputEvent → FIFO链表]
        Q → R[doProcessInputEvents]
        R → S[InputStage 链处理]
        S → T[View.dispatchEvent]
    end
```

---

## 六、回答核心问题

### Q1: Looper 是如何执行接收的？

**基于 epoll 的就绪通知模式**：
1. `NativeInputEventReceiver` 通过 `Looper::addFd()` 注册 socket fd
2. 主线程调用 `pollOnce()` → `epoll_wait()` 阻塞等待
3. socket 可读时 `epoll_wait()` 返回 → 回调 `handleEvent()`
4. `handleEvent()` 持续触发直到 socket 无数据

### Q2: 是接收到一个一个进行派发还是 batch 批量进行派发？

**两者结合，采用双层 Batching**：

1. **Socket 读取层**：每条 InputMessage 通过 `recv()` 读取，但多个 MOVE 样本合并到同一 MotionEvent 的历史样本中
2. **App-draw 层**：通过 Choreographer 调度，确保**每帧最多分发 1 个批次**到 View

**关键洞察**：`consume()` 不会每收到一个事件就立即派发到 View，而是：
- MOVE 事件 → 暂存 → 等 vsync 前统一消费 → 每帧一次派发
- 非 MOVE 事件 → 直接处理

---

## 硬性事实清单

| 事实 | 验证来源 | 置信度 |
|------|----------|--------|
| Looper 内部使用 epoll() | AOSP master Looper.cpp | **高** |
| Socket 类型为 AF_UNIX + SOCK_SEQPACKET | AOSP master InputTransport.cpp | **高** |
| handleEvent 持续触发直到 socket 无数据 | AOSP android_view_InputEventReceiver.md | **高** |
| consume() 两种互斥调用模式 | AOSP android_view_InputEventReceiver.md | **高** |
| 每帧最多分发 1 个批次 | AOSP 文档 + MotionEvent 官方文档 | **高** |
| 批量样本通过 getHistorySize() 访问 | 官方 MotionEvent API 文档 | **高** |
| FIFO 链表保证入队顺序 | AOSP ViewRootImpl.java | **高** |
| InputStage 7 层链式处理 | 多个中文博客 + Tavily 搜索 | **高** |

- AOSP 文档明确说明：*"Most apps draw once per vsync. If multiple input events come in during 1 vsync, it would be wasteful to deliver them all at once"*

---

## 四、应用侧进一步派发

### 4.1 enqueueInputEvent() → FIFO 链表

接收后，事件被加入 **FIFO 链表**：

```
mPendingInputEventHead ←→ [event1] ←→ [event2] ←→ [event3] ←→ mPendingInputEventTail
```

- **顺序保证**：按入队顺序处理，而非时间戳顺序
- **原因**：确保 injected 事件的 FIFO 语义
- [源码确认：android.googlesource.com - ViewRootImpl.java](https://android.googlesource.com/platform/frameworks/base/+/master/core/java/android/view/ViewRootImpl.java)

### 4.2 doProcessInputEvents() 逐个遍历

```java
while (mPendingInputEventHead != null) {
    QueuedInputEvent q = mPendingInputEventHead;
    mPendingInputEventHead = q.next;
    
    deliverInputEvent(q);  // 逐个派发
}
```

### 4.3 InputStage 链式处理

事件经过 **7 层 InputStage** 最终分发到 View：

```
QueuedInputEvent
    ↓
SyntheticInputStage          ← 处理合成事件（轨迹球等）
    ↓
EarlyPostImeInputStage       ← IME 前置处理
    ↓
ViewPreImeInputStage        ← View 的 IME 前回调
    ↓
ImeInputStage               ← IME 处理
    ↓
ViewPostImeInputStage       ← View 的 IME 后回调
    ↓
native PreImeInputStage     ← Native 层前置
    ↓
native PostImeInputStage    ← Native 层后置
    ↓
DecorView.dispatchEvent()    ← 最终分发到 View
```

## 六、回答核心问题

### Q1: Looper 是如何执行接收的？

**基于 epoll 的就绪通知模式**：
1. `NativeInputEventReceiver` 通过 `Looper::addFd()` 注册 socket fd
2. 主线程调用 `pollOnce()` → `epoll_wait()` 阻塞等待
3. socket 可读时 `epoll_wait()` 返回 → 回调 `handleEvent()`
4. `handleEvent()` 持续触发直到 socket 无数据

### Q2: 是接收到一个一个进行派发还是 batch 批量进行派发？

**两者结合，采用双层 Batching**：

1. **Socket 读取层**：每条 InputMessage 通过 `recv()` 读取，但多个 MOVE 样本合并到同一 MotionEvent 的历史样本中
2. **App-draw 层**：通过 Choreographer 调度，确保**每帧最多分发 1 个批次**到 View

**关键洞察**：`consume()` 不会每收到一个事件就立即派发到 View，而是：
- MOVE 事件 → 暂存 → 等 vsync 前统一消费 → 每帧一次派发
- 非 MOVE 事件 → 直接处理
